title: PM Lane 411 Revision B - Project Miner Temp Power Apparatus Completion Revenue Recognition No-Live Design Packet
scope: Lane 280 status-mutation extension admission-gate tightening only

preconditions: apparatus belongs to the admitted imported project and scope
apparatus has an associated seam.apparatus_financials row for the referenced contract_snapshot_id
snapshot belongs to the same project
no unreversed recognized event exists unless exact same-payload replay

project has a current GET /api/v1/reads/project-import-contract-support-status response with classification = ready, current_candidate_match = true, and counts_match = true; this precondition is evaluated at admission time, not at every mutation call
lane_280_extension.admission_time_gate: Live admission is undiscussable until Lane 412 readback returns classification = ready for the project in current production state. This is a one-time admission gate, not a runtime check on each recognition event.
lane_280_extension.runtime_safety_note: Runtime safety continues to rely on the per-mutation requirement that the apparatus has an associated seam.apparatus_financials row for the referenced contract_snapshot_id.
lane_280_extension.audit_traceability: lane_412_readback_classification_at_admission_time is captured once at admission time and stamped on every event row created under the extension

bidirectional_gate.lane_411_side: Lane 280 extension preconditions and admission-time gate language require Lane 412 readback ready before live admission is discussable.
bidirectional_gate.lane_412_side: Lane 412 readback downstream gate clause blocks later Lane 280 live admission until readback is ready.
bidirectional_gate.rule: Both directions must remain in place.

boundaries: No billing, invoice, payroll, accounting, customer-billing, or external-finance output
No source workbook writeback or macros
No live operational hours tracking implementation
No live admission of the Lane 280 status-mutation extension unless Lane 412 readback has passed the one-time classification = ready gate
validation_steps: Search confirms the Lane 280 precondition list includes the Lane 412 readback ready requirement
Search confirms a dedicated admission-time gate language section exists separately from the precondition list
Search confirms the readback contract includes lane_412_readback_classification_at_admission_time
Search confirms the boundary list includes the Lane 412 readiness gate item
Search confirms inherited Revision A surfaces are unchanged in this revision packet family
Search confirms the legacy underscore revenue token is absent from Revision B surfaces
